leadText: Wing Attack (Japanese: つばさでうつ Wing Strike) is a damage-dealing Flying-type move introduced in Generation I.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Generation I 1.2 Generations II onwards 1.3 Generation IX 1.3.1 Pokémon Legends: Z-A Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generation I [ edit | edit source ] Wing Attack inflicts damage and has no secondary effect. It has a power of 35. Generations II onwards [ edit | edit source ] Wing Attack's power increases to 60. It can hit non-adjacent opponents in Triple Battles . Generation IX [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Legends: Z-A [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Legends: Z-A Category Physical Accuracy 100% Standard Plus Move Power 60 72 Cooldown 6s Move wind-up time 10 frames Effect duration —s Additional effect — — — None

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Only in the Japanese version of Pokémon Stadium (the second Japanese game in the series ), Wing Attack's description erroneously states that this is a Normal-type move. Games Description Stad A Flying -type attack. The attacking Pok é mon spreads its wings and charges at the target. Stad2 A Flying -type attack. The attacking Pok é mon spreads its wings and charges. G S C Strikes the target with wings. R S E Strikes the foe with wings spread wide. FR LG The foe is struck with large, imposing wings spread wide. Colo XD Strikes the target with wings spread wide. D P Pt HG SS PBR The foe is struck with large, imposing wings spread wide to inflict damage. B W B2 W2 X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V The target is struck with large, imposing wings spread wide to inflict damage. ZA The user attacks by spreading its imposing wings wide and slamming them into targets.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD R B MD T D S Inflicts damage on the target. B S L てきポケモンに ダメージをあたえる Conq. The target is struck with large, imposing wings spread wide to inflict damage. MD GtI S MD MD RT DX It damages an enemy.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] Wing Attack has the highest PP to power ratio of all moves. This record was previously held by Extrasensory before its PP was reduced in Generation VI .
